name: Part the Veil of Snow
title: Flins: Part the Veil of Snow
in_play_description: After you trigger a Lunar-Charged reaction: Flins gains 1 Energy. (Once per Round)

attributes.source: Reward for inviting Flins to a duel at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives

skills.desc:
Fast Action: Equip this to your Flins.
Flins gains 1 Energy.
After you trigger a Lunar-Charged reaction: Flins gains 1 Energy. (Once per Round)
(You must have Flins in your deck to add this card to your deck)
